case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BERKELEY BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
PLTF'S OBJECTION TO DEFTS' FILING IN VIOLATION OF CCP 1005 (MOTION BY REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BOND)
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF APR-12-2000, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BERKELEY BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY-VACATING SUMMARY JUDGMENT,SETTING ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE AND EXONERATING BAIL, FILED BY DEFENDANT:BERKELEY BAIL BOND AGENCY
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2000, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BERKELEY BAIL BONDS
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BERKELEY BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
